message:
test(engine): add enum Ord contract-stability tests across 16 modules

Verify derive(Ord) discriminant ordering for all enums in
baseline_interpreter, bayesian_posterior, canonical_evidence_emitter,
counterexample_synthesizer, cx_threading, evidence_replay_checker,
extension_lifecycle_manager, flamegraph_pipeline, module_compatibility_matrix,
promotion_gate_runner, proof_specialization_receipt, release_gate,
shadow_ablation_engine, simd_lexer, specialization_conformance, and
specialization_perf_release_gate. These guard against accidental variant
reordering that would silently change comparison semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
